name: MoneyGram
description_short: MoneyGram is a global money transfer service offering domestic and international funds transfers, bill payments, and money orders through 39+ locations in Fresno, CA.
description_long:
MoneyGram is an established money transfer company that operates a network of physical locations across the United States, including multiple service points throughout Fresno, California. The company enables consumers to send and receive money domestically and internationally, serving customers who need quick access to funds or prefer in-person transaction handling.

MoneyGram's core offerings include domestic money transfers, international money transfers, bill payment services, and money orders. Customers can initiate and manage transfers both online through their website and in-person at any of their service locations. The Fresno network includes standalone MoneyGram agents as well as partnerships with major retailers like Walmart, CVS, Save Mart, and financial service providers like Ace Cash Express, providing multiple convenient access points across different neighborhoods and shopping areas.

What distinguishes MoneyGram is its dual-channel delivery model—customers can complete transactions entirely online or visit physical locations for in-person service. The company's extensive retail partnerships mean MoneyGram services are available during extended hours at major retailers (Walmart locations open until 11:59 PM, CVS until 10 PM), rather than limiting transactions to traditional business hours. This accessibility is particularly valuable for working individuals and those without digital banking access.

MoneyGram is best suited for consumers who need reliable, established money transfer services with immediate access to physical locations. However, prospective customers should compare transfer fees and exchange rates against competitors, as MoneyGram's pricing is typically higher than digital-native alternatives. The company's primary value proposition is convenience and accessibility rather than competitive pricing.
pros: 39 service locations across Fresno providing convenient geographic access
Extended hours at major retailers—Walmart open until 11:59 PM, CVS until 10 PM
Hybrid service model allows both online and in-person transactions
Partnership with established retailers (Walmart, CVS, Save Mart) for credibility and accessibility
Both domestic and international money transfer capabilities
Established global brand with long operational history
Multiple neighborhood locations including east, west, and central Fresno areas
cons: Higher transfer fees compared to digital-first money transfer services
Typically unfavorable exchange rates on international transfers versus competitors
Limited cost transparency on website—specific fees and rates not displayed
Reliance on agent locations may result in slower service than instant digital transfers
No mention of fraud protection or dispute resolution guarantees on website
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who prefer cash-based transactions
International money senders supporting family abroad without online banking setup
Customers needing same-day cash access who value physical location presence
Retail shoppers already visiting Walmart or CVS who need bill payment or money orders
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for consumers who need accessible, in-person money transfer services and value convenience over competitive pricing. Primary caveat: transfer fees and exchange rates are typically higher than digital alternatives like Wise or Remitly; customers should compare costs before committing, especially for frequent international transfers.
services: Location finder by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Partner retail location services (Walmart, CVS, Save Mart)
